# inputText

**Instance Property**

The source text to translate.

## Declaration

```swift
var inputText: AttributedString? { get }
```

## Instance Properties

- **allowsReplacement**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the control can replace the source text.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the control can replace the source text.
